VoiceAnalysis.title: Voice Analysis
VoiceAnalysis.description: A record of a voice analysis session, including the corrected text and vocal profile.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the analysis.

originalText.description: Text extracted from the original audio.

correctedText.description: The perfected/corrected version of the text.

audioUrl.description: URL to the generated audio file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the analysis was created.
